sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value DECIMAL(10, 2), category TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP);
SELECT ntile(2 + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table)) OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY created_at) AS bucket, SUM(value) AS total_value FROM test_table GROUP BY bucket HAVING total_value > 0.01;
SELECT e.id, e.value + (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE category = 'A') AS adjusted_value FROM test_table e WHERE ntile(4) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) = 1;
SELECT category, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ntile(3) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) AS activity_level FROM test_table GROUP BY category HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1;
SELECT t1.value + COALESCE(t2.value, 0) AS final_value FROM test_table t1 LEFT JOIN test_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.id + 2 WHERE t1.value IS NOT NULL;

SELECT e1.category, ntile(5) OVER (PARTITION BY e1.category ORDER BY e1.created_at) AS tile_num FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value > 10) e1 WHERE ntile(5) OVER (ORDER BY e1.created_at) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ntile(10) OVER (PARTITION BY category ORDER BY value + (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) AS tile_num FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value + (ntile(4) OVER (ORDER BY created_at) * 10) AS adjusted_value FROM test_table;
CREATE TABLE other_table (ref_id INTEGER, extra_value DECIMAL(10, 2));
SELECT t.id, t.value + (SELECT SUM(extra_value) FROM other_table WHERE ref_id = t.id) FROM test_table t WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY value DESC;
